value.found_quote: Remote connections let you use Codex from another device or another machine. ... - Start new threads in projects on the host, or continue existing ones. - Send follow-up instructions, answer questions, and steer active work. - Approve commands and other actions. - Review outputs, diffs, test results, terminal output, and screenshots. - Get notified when Codex completes a task or needs your attention.
value.rationale: The page is dedicated to Remote connections and describes all claimed capabilities: using Codex from another device/machine, starting/continuing threads, steering work, approving actions, reviewing outputs, and notifications. Described as a current feature with no deprecation notice.
